'''Ralpe''' was a [[Sniper/Legends|sharpshooter]] in the [[Galactic Alliance Guard]]. He was killed during the [[Battle of Ossus (Second Galactic Civil War)|Battle of Ossus]] when [[Jaina Solo Fel|Jaina Solo]] shot him in the head.

==Appearances==
*''[[Legacy of the Force: Inferno]]'' {{1st}}

==Sources==
*<!-- 2008-12-09 -->''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]''
